caption: Step 1: Open the Mondula multi-step form demo page
description: Open the Mondula multi-step form demo page
narration: Ladies and gentlemen, fasten your seatbelts. We are about to make a web form feel exciting. Mondula is sleek, green, and suspiciously clean.

caption: Step 2: Move from the intro page to the first form step
description: Move from the intro page to the first form step
narration: Accept those cookies, om nom nom, and blow past the intro. Hit Next Step and let's get to work.
fallback_narration: Accept the intro and move to the first real step.

caption: Step 3: Fill first page text and textarea fields
description: Fill first page text and textarea fields
narration: Section one. Watch the fingers fly. Pavan Demo goes in, and the textarea becomes a tiny manifesto for automation.
fallback_narration: Fill the first text fields and the textarea.

caption: Step 4: Go to the next page with additional input fields
description: Go to the next page with additional input fields
narration: Page two, and now we wait. Quick breather. Why do we mash dead remote batteries harder? Nobody knows.
fallback_narration: Move to page two and wait for the next section.

caption: Step 5: Fill text, custom textarea, and date fields on page two
description: Fill text, custom textarea, and date fields on page two
narration: Boom, we're back. Automation field, check. Second value, check. March thirteenth on the calendar. A fine day for destiny.
fallback_narration: Fill page two and choose the date.

caption: Step 6: Proceed to radio, checkbox, and dropdown inputs
description: Proceed to radio, checkbox, and dropdown inputs
narration: Next step, please. Loading takes its sweet time, like a cat deciding whether it actually wants to go outside.
fallback_narration: Next page. Radio, checkboxes, and dropdowns are loading.

caption: Step 7: Select a radio option, multiple checkboxes, and a dropdown value
description: Select a radio option, multiple checkboxes, and a dropdown value
narration: And we're live. Radio buttons, checkboxes, dropdowns. A digital buffet, and we're sampling like professionals.
fallback_narration: Pick the radio, checkboxes, and dropdown.

caption: Step 8: Open the conditional input section
narration: Now the conditional section opens, and the plot thickens. We choose pizza, because we are not monsters.

caption: Step 9: Fill conditional fields based on the selected dish
description: Fill conditional fields based on the selected dish
narration: Thin crust, obviously. Olives and corn, bold choice. Pesto Rosso sauce, because we're fancy today.

caption: Step 10: Move to the final contact-details page
description: Move to the final contact-details page
narration: One last wait. If you're still here, you're a champion. Data immortality is seconds away.
fallback_narration: One last wait before the contact page.

caption: Step 11: Fill final contact page with six required input fields
description: Fill final contact page with six required input fields
narration: Final lap. Pavan Kumar goes in, birthday locked, phone, email, and production details all lined up. Big leagues only.

caption: Step 12: Review summary and reach submit-ready final state
description: Review summary and reach submit-ready final state
narration: Grand finale. Review the summary. Everything looks perfect. We came, we automated. Mondula zero, Pavan one.
fallback_narration: And that's a wrap for Overpass.
